stories.title: S.F. protesters march on OpenAI, Anthropic and Google DeepMind to demand: ‘Stop the AI race’
stories.simple_summary: People protested outside AI companies in San Francisco, asking them to slow down their race to build more powerful AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows some people worry AI is moving too fast, but it doesn't directly affect your daily life or business right now.

stories.title: The Public Got So Mad at Meta’s New AI Photo Tool That It’s Scrapped Already
stories.simple_summary: Meta created an AI tool that made fake photos, but so many people complained that Meta removed it within days.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows companies listen when customers are unhappy — if you use Meta's apps, you won't see this feature.

stories.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI is hiring someone to make ChatGPT work better for families and older adults.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have grandchildren or want to learn about AI tools yourself, ChatGPT may become easier to use for you.

stories.title: Silicon Valley's next generation feels the AI blues
stories.simple_summary: Young workers in the tech industry are feeling stressed or worried about something (the headline is vague).
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly news about the tech industry itself — it doesn't affect you.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.simple_summary: Meta removed an Instagram feature that used AI after lots of people said they didn't like it.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, one AI feature will no longer be available to you.

stories.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.simple_summary: Meta turned off an Instagram tool that let people create fake AI pictures of real people's accounts without permission.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're on Instagram, you're protected from having AI deepfakes made of your photos without your say-so.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI, alleging artificial intelligence company stole trade secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, claiming OpenAI stole secret information from Apple.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a legal battle between two big companies — it doesn't affect you unless you work at one of them.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple claims that former Apple workers who now work at OpenAI took Apple's secret technology plans with them.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a legal dispute between big tech companies — it won't change what you experience as a customer.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI for allegedly stealing trade secrets, and Apple says OpenAI's leaders approved it.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a lawsuit between big companies over secret information — it doesn't affect your everyday life.

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.simple_summary: Open source AI (free AI code that anyone can use and modify) is becoming very popular, and many Fortune 500 companies use it.
stories.why_it_matters: This means AI tools are becoming more available to everyone, including small businesses, since they don't all have to build from scratch.

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.simple_summary: A Korean chip company raised a record amount of money on the stock market because AI computers need lots of special chips.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly exciting news for investors — it shows AI is creating demand for computer hardware, but doesn't change much for your business.

stories.title: How KTern.AI built agentic AI for SAP on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
stories.simple_summary: A company built an AI assistant tool for SAP accounting software using Amazon's AI services.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use SAP software for your business, there may be new AI features coming, but this is technical news mostly for IT professionals.
